Cloud Monitoring

Large Scale

Utility-Scale Energy Storage System

Capacity: 500kWh – 10MWh+

Industrial and utility-scale battery energy storage for grid stabilization, peak shaving, and renewable integration.

  • Modular battery cabinet design
  • BMS with cell-level monitoring
  • Grid-tied & off-grid modes
  • Fire suppression integrated
  • SCADA remote monitoring
Request Quote
Commercial

Commercial Solar + Storage System

Capacity: 50kWh – 500kWh

Solar generation combined with storage for commercial buildings, reducing electricity costs and improving energy independence.

  • Rooftop or ground-mount solar
  • Lithium iron phosphate cells
  • Intelligent energy dispatch
  • Real-time monitoring app
  • ROI optimization algorithm
Request Quote
All-in-One

Integrated PV + Storage + Charging Station

Capacity: Customizable

Complete integrated station combining photovoltaic generation, battery storage, and EV charging in one system.

  • Solar + battery + EV charger combo
  • Minimal grid dependency
  • Smart charging scheduler
  • V2G ready architecture
  • EPC turn-key available
Request Quote

EV Fast Charging — a global clean energy technology company dedicated to next-generation electric vehicle charging solutions and smart energy infrastructure.
